title: Electric Space Heater, 2000W Fan Heaters For Home Energy Efficient, Slient, Thermostat, 3 Modes, 60° Oscillation, 12H Timer, Overheat & Tip-Over Protection, ECO Portable Ceramic Heater
features: 【3S Fast Heating】: This fan heater offers 3 heating modes: natural air/low heat 1300W/high heat 2000W. It features a PTC ceramic heating element and a 60-degree rotating air supply angle, ensuring rapid and even heating. This effectively eliminates cold in a short period, providing a warmer and more energy-efficient environment.

【Thermostatic Control】: The electric heater energy efficient feature allows for real-time adjustment of the temperature between 15-35°C based on the ambient temperature. It accurately displays the ambient temperature on the LED screen, enabling you to easily customize the environment temperature in colder conditions, effectively reducing energy costs.

【Safety Assurance】: The standard UK plug-in heater is equipped with a variety of built-in safety features, including overheat and tip-over protection, an ABS fire-resistant casing, and even safer V-0 flame-retardant materials. This ensures the safety of home heating. Its removable filter allows for easy cleaning at any time, effectively filtering out dust from the air, providing you with clean and warm air!

【Convenient and Easy to Use】: The space heater comes with a 12-hour timer setting, which automatically shuts off the electric heater once the designated time is reached. Its operating sound level below 45 decibels, allows you to fall asleep in a quiet and cozy warmth while conserving electricity. With the included remote control, you can conveniently operate the electric heater from the comfort of your sofa or bed, adding more convenience to your daily life.

【Ideal Heater for Winter】: This portable ceramic heater is the perfect companion for the winter season and makes an excellent gift for family and friends during winter or Christmas. We provide a 12-month warranty for this home heater to ensure your peace of mind during the colder months. If you have any questions about our heater, please don't hesitate to reach out. We are here to assist you with pleasure.
description: Product Description Say No to High Spending on Winter Power Bills Previous page Next page Previous page Next page 1 Saftey Protection 2 Low Noise More Convenience Settings Remote Control Easily adjust heater settings without having to sit up! 12H Timer Easily set the time to sleep at ease, effectively controlling the cost of energy saving! Detachable filter Detachable filter, easy to clean and filter dust impurities in the air! Portable Handle Portable design, easy to carry in bedroom and living room, study room!
